dir:src.userDescription: Holds the complete Golden Fixture package with its live service and greeting tools. Everything needed to run the service and track its version is kept together here.

dir:src/golden_app.userDescription: Puts together a live service that shows its health status and delivers personalized greetings. It keeps the version number handy so everyone knows which edition is running.

file:src/golden_app/__init__.py.userDescription: Holds the version number for the Golden Fixture package. This helps track which release is running and ensures everyone is working with the same edition.

file:src/golden_app/app.py.displayName: Live service with two ready features
file:src/golden_app/app.py.userDescription: Bundles a service health check and a personalized greeting tool into one accessible package. Operators can instantly see if everything is working, and users get customized hellos that make interactions feel personal.

file:src/golden_app/core.py.userDescription: Transforms any name into a clean, friendly greeting. It ensures names are properly formatted and always returns a warm welcome message for use elsewhere.

py:boundary:unresolved.userDescription: This is not runnable code by itself; it is a grouping for calls from your functions toward targets this index does not show as their own function boxes. These calls include creating a FastAPI web application object and registering route handlers for endpoints like /greet/{name} and /health.

raw-root.userDescription: Delivers a friendly greeting service that welcomes people by name. Keeps all the code and version tracking in one tidy package for easy setup and maintenance.

sym:src/golden_app/app.py:golden_app.app.userDescription: Sets up the Golden Fixture API with two ready-to-use features. It bundles a service health check and a personalized greeting tool into one accessible package.
Takes a person's name and returns a friendly welcome message. Users get a customized hello that makes the interaction feel personal.
Provides a quick yes/no signal about whether the service is running properly. Operators can instantly see if everything is working as expected.

sym:src/golden_app/core.py:golden_app.co.userDescription: Transforms any name into a clean, friendly greeting. It ensures names are properly formatted and always returns a warm welcome message.
